name: codey
description: Codey — a Kirby design-system starter. Clone it to begin a new project. src/ is the source of truth; the build scripts compile src/assets → build/assets and mirror src/site → build/site.
author: Ian Hobbs Media

scripts.assets: npm run css && npm run js
scripts.build: npm run site && npm run assets
scripts.styleguide: cd styleguide-builder && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build
scripts.setup: cd build && composer install && cd .. && npm run seed && npm run build
